strengths: ~15 years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of founding GISCollective and public speaking/workshops shows builder mindset and thought-sharing
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research output beyond recent agent tooling
Career level is Senior/Staff IC; no evidence of Director/Principal-level strategic influence or advising strategic customers
No Master's/PhD in AI; cloud experience is limited (AWS CDK use) without deep platform strategy signals

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Breadth of engineering experience and builder fluency

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption. The résumé shows a strong, versatile senior/staff engineer with ~15 years across full-stack, embedded, and high-performance systems, plus recent contributions to MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq — but no shipped AI products, no published AI research, and no prior Principal/Director-level strategy or customer-advisory scope. Cloud signal is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz rather than platform-level strategy. Builder credibility and community presence (GISCollective, talks, workshops) are real positives, but the core competencies of recognized AI authority and executive-level technical influence are not evidenced.
